recommendations.title: Married to the Mob
recommendations.overview: Angela de Marco is fed up with her gangster husband's line of work and wants no part of the crime world. When her husband is killed for having an affair with the mistress of mob boss Tony "The Tiger" Russo, Angela and her son depart for New York City

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Rififi
recommendations.overview: Out of prison after a five-year stretch, jewel thief Tony turns down a quick job his friend Jo offers him, until he discovers that his old girlfriend Mado has become the lover of local gangster Pierre Grutter during Tony's absence. Expanding a minor

recommendations.title: Night Call
recommendations.overview: Mady, a student, works as a locksmith by night. He helps Claire get into her apartment and soon realizes that she lied to him about her identity and robbed something that belonged to a dangerous man, Yannick. Mady gets embroiled in a manhunt and will

recommendations.title: The Thousand Eyes of Dr. Mabuse
recommendations.overview: A reporter is murdered while driving to his job. The Police are contacted by a clairvoyant who saw the death in a vision, but some dark force is preventing him from seeing the man behind the crime...

recommendations.title: To Catch a Killer
recommendations.overview: Baltimore. New Year's Eve. A talented but troubled police officer is recruited by the FBI's chief investigator to help profile and track down a mass murderer.

recommendations.title: Death of a Cyclist
recommendations.overview: A couple having an affair strike a bicyclist with their car and do not offer aid out of fear of their relationship being exposed.

recommendations.title: 10 Days of a Bad Man
recommendations.overview: Battered, broken and bereaved, a private investigator must muscle his way through a tangle of lies to uncover the truth behind a mansion murder.

recommendations.title: Blood Simple
recommendations.overview: The owner of a seedy small-town Texas bar discovers that one of his employees is having an affair with his wife. A chaotic chain of misunderstandings, lies and mischief ensues after he devises a plot to have them murdered.

recommendations.title: ¿Y Cómo Es Él?
recommendations.overview: Thomas is a meek man on the verge of a nervous breakdown. Despite his situation he decides to fake a work trip to go to Vallarta to confront Jero, a taxi driver who is sleeping with his wife.
